channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Prime minister says it’s his ‘duty’ to continue as leader after two allies quit in defence spending row
item.description: Starmer latest: Prime minister says it’s his ‘duty’ to continue as leader after two allies quit in defence spending row

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer defends investment on defence as he vows to fight any leadership challenge – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer defends investment on defence as he vows to fight any leadership challenge – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: I have a duty to stay on, says PM as he justifies defence spending
item.description: I have a duty to stay on, says PM as he justifies defence spending

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Starmer won't prevent far-right riots because he will not take on X. He won't ramp up defence in the face of Trump and Putin because he refuses to take hard financial decisions. He has failed to protect Britain agains...
item.description: Starmer won't prevent far-right riots because he will not take on X. He won't ramp up defence in the face of Trump and Putin because he refuses to take hard financial decisions. He has failed to protect Britain agains...

item.title: ConservativeHome: Tommy Birch: John Healey's resignation is proof the government has lost the ability to make hard choices
item.description: Tommy Birch: John Healey's resignation is proof the government has lost the ability to make hard choices

item.title: i Politics: 'Skip a generation': Ex-Commando Al Carns emerges as Labour's plan B for PM
item.description: 'Skip a generation': Ex-Commando Al Carns emerges as Labour's plan B for PM

item.title: The Guardian: Left, right and centre – I see all strands of the Labour tribe pulling together in Makerfield. This is bigger than Burnham - The Guardian
item.description: Left, right and centre – I see all strands of the Labour tribe pulling together in Makerfield. This is bigger than Burnham - The Guardian

item.title: BBC Politics: Troubles' legacy bill 'unfit for purpose' says ex-minister
item.description: Troubles' legacy bill 'unfit for purpose' says ex-minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Could Starmer resign and who are the top contenders to replace him as prime minister?
item.description: Could Starmer resign and who are the top contenders to replace him as prime minister?

item.title: BBC Politics: PM needs to make 'bold' decisions on defence spending, says Carns
item.description: PM needs to make 'bold' decisions on defence spending, says Carns
